summary: Comprehensive testing of NeoNoble Ramp Admin Dashboard, Token Management, and Subscription System. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin Panel with all tabs, Token Creation/List, and Subscription Plans pages working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read' error but listing request still succeeds

critical_code_review_comments: All Admin Dashboard tabs (Overview, Token, Listing, Users, Subscriptions) load real data from backend APIs
Token CRUD workflow complete: Create -> Admin Approve -> Go Live -> Request Listing
6 subscription plans correctly seeded with proper pricing (Free to Enterprise €999.99)
Monthly/yearly billing toggle works correctly with 17% yearly discount
Admin users endpoint returns complete user list with roles (ADMIN, USER, DEVELOPER)
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all interactive elements
test_credentials: Admin: admin@neonobleramp.com / Admin1234!, Regular user: testchart@example.com / Test1234!
seed_data_creation: Multiple test tokens created during testing (TestToken2, ListingTest352145, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Dashboard fully functional with real backend data. Token creation and approval workflow complete. 6 subscription plans available. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_token_subscription.py covers all admin, token, and subscription endpoints.

admin_dashboard.Overview Tab: ✓ Shows real stats: 76 users, 5 tokens, fee structure (€100 creation, €500 listing)
admin_dashboard.Token Tab: ✓ Lists tokens with status filters (Pending, Approved, Live, Rejected)
admin_dashboard.Listings Tab: ✓ Shows pending listing requests with Approve/Reject
admin_dashboard.Users Tab: ✓ Shows user list with roles (ADMIN, USER, DEVELOPER)
admin_dashboard.Subscriptions Tab: ✓ Shows subscription list with plan, cycle, amount, status

token_management.POST /api/tokens/create: ✓ Creates token with pending status, €100 creation fee
token_management.POST /api/tokens/{id}/admin-action: ✓ approve, reject, go_live, pause, unpause all working
token_management.GET /api/tokens/stats/overview: ✓ Returns token/listing/trading_pair counts and fee structure
token_management.POST /api/tokens/listings/create: ✓ Creates listing request with Standard €500, Premium €2000, Featured €5000

subscription_system.GET /api/subscriptions/plans/list: ✓ Returns 6 plans (Free, Pro Trader, Premium, Dev Basic, Dev Pro, Enterprise)
subscription_system.POST /api/subscriptions/subscribe: ✓ Creates active subscription with billing cycle

auth_admin.GET /api/auth/admin/users: ✓ Returns user list with roles (admin only)

frontend_pages./tokens/create: ✓ Token creation form with blockchain selection
frontend_pages./tokens/list: ✓ Token marketplace with search and filters
